vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is partially accurate but shows significant decline. P3 (Pothos) is present with the rabbit anchor. P1 (String of Nickels) is present in the yellow pot. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) appear to be the same pot, currently showing signs of severe senescence or total loss.

plant_audit.P1: String of Nickels: Stable, showing minimal growth, consistent leaf count.
plant_audit.P2_P4: Mexican Mint/Silver Guest: The specimen has undergone complete chlorosis and necrosis. The stem is brown and shriveled; no viable green tissue remains.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos: The primary leaf is showing signs of chlorosis (yellowing) and edge necrosis. The plant is in a state of physiological stress.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Soil appears consistently damp/dark across all pots. No fungal blooms observed, but surface debris (white perlite/eggshell fragments) is present.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant debris or pests detected.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-1: Gradual decline in P3 leaf health (increasing yellowing). P2/P4 shows progressive browning and loss of turgor.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Significant light reduction in the current image makes precise observation difficult, but the necrotic state of the P2/P4 remains unchanged.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: P3 is in a state of decline due to likely overwatering or light deficiency. P2/P4 is confirmed dead. P1 is the only stable specimen.
vision_report.anomalies: The current image (CURRENT) has significantly lower exposure/lighting compared to the previous sequence, obscuring fine detail.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a chronological audit of the biome. The Pothos (P3) is struggling with chlorosis, likely due to environmental stress. The Mexican Mint/Silver Guest (P2/P4) has suffered a total systemic loss, with no signs of recovery. The String of Nickels (P1) remains the most resilient occupant. The lighting in the final capture is suboptimal, hindering a high-fidelity assessment of the soil surface.
